task_completion.description: Agent enters 'Eiffel Tower' or relevant keywords into the search bar
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text input field containing 'Eiffel Tower', 'Paris', or similar search terms.

task_completion.description: Agent selects the correct location from search suggestions or results
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dropdown menu or search result list with 'Eiffel Tower' highlighted or clicked.

task_completion.description: The map view updates to show the general area of Paris, France
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view showing the Seine River, French street names, or the city label 'Paris'.

task_completion.description: The specific landmark (Eiffel Tower) or its distinct footprint is visible on the map
task_completion.visual_evidence: Satellite or map view showing the distinct structure of the Eiffel Tower or the Champ de Mars park layout.

task_completion.description: The final state confirms the specific location is the Eiffel Tower via a pin or info card
task_completion.visual_evidence: A location pin dropped on the tower, or an information side-panel/card displaying 'Eiffel Tower'.

integrity.description: Agent uses the map interface directly rather than programmatic API calls
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with search bars, map controls, or menus, not terminal/code execution.

integrity.description: Agent is interacting with a map application/website, not a text editor or static image viewer
integrity.visual_evidence: The active window is a browser with a map site (e.g., Google Maps, OpenStreetMap) or a map application.

integrity.description: The displayed location matches the requested target visually
integrity.visual_evidence: The map view is not blank or showing a completely different city/location than Paris.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target destination is the Eiffel Tower, located in Paris, France, near the Seine River and on the Champ de Mars.
